2605.05066.title: The Impossibility Triangle of Long-Context Modeling
2605.05066.paper_summary: We identify and prove a fundamental trade-off governing long-sequence models: no model can simultaneously achieve (i) per-step computation independent of sequence length (Efficiency), (ii) state size independent of sequence length (Compactness), and (iii) the ability to recall a number of historical facts proportional to sequence length (Recall). We formalize this trade-off within an Online Sequence Processor abstraction that unifies Transformers, state space models, linear recurrent networks, and their hybrids. Using the Data Processing Inequality and Fano's Inequality, we prove that any model satisfying Efficiency and Compactness can recall at most O(poly(d)/log V) key-value pairs from a sequence of arbitrary length, where d is the model dimension and V is the vocabulary size. We classify 52 architectures published before March 2026 into the triangle, showing that each achieves at most two of the three properties and that hybrid architectures trace continuous trajectories in the interior. Experiments on synthetic associative recall tasks with five representative architectures validate the theoretical bound: empirical recall capacity lies strictly below the information-theoretic limit, and no architecture escapes the triangle.
2605.05066.paper_summary_zh: 我們識別並證明了一個支配長序列模型的基本權衡：沒有任何模型可以同時實現 (i) 每步計算與序列長度無關的效率 (Efficiency)、(ii) 狀態大小與序列長度無關的緊湊性 (Compactness)，以及 (iii) 能夠回憶與序列長度成比例的歷史事實的能力 (Recall)。我們在一個在線序列處理器的抽象框架中形式化這個權衡，該框架統一了Transformer、狀態空間模型、線性遞歸網絡及其混合體。利用數據處理不等式和法諾不等式，我們證明任何滿足效率和緊湊性的模型最多可以從任意長度的序列中回憶出 O(poly(d)/log V) 個鍵值對，其中 d 是模型維度，V 是詞彙大小。我們將2026年3月之前發表的52種架構分類到這個三角形中，顯示每種架構最多實現三個特性中的兩個，並且混合架構在內部描繪出連續的軌跡。在五種代表性架構的合成聯想回憶任務上的實驗驗證了理論界限：經驗回憶能力嚴格低於信息理論極限，並且沒有架構能逃脫這個三角形。
2605.05066.author: Yan Zhou et.al.
